title: A Trip Abroad and a Valuable Lesson
article_text: I used to think traveling abroad was only for the rich, but last year I saved money and went. My soul felt perfectly happy when I saw the presidential palace in the nearby city. I was capable of learning new things, and I wanted to enhance my educational experience. During an emergency, a kind man helped me; he was a manufacturer of coats. I was proud to distinguish myself by learning about democracy in a different country. The crash of a slide at the park was a substantial problem, but we coped well. I personally bought a valuable gift for my friend, and she put it in her pocket. My breast felt warm with joy when I received a lucky coin from a stranger. The defeat of my fear was a great achievement, and I learned approximately ten new words. Swimming is fun, and it helps me relax after a long day of study.

sentences.zh: 我过去以为出国旅行只是有钱人的事，但去年我攒了钱就去了。

vocabulary.eng_def: worth a lot of money or very useful
vocabulary.example: This ring is very valuable.

vocabulary.eng_def: done by a particular person themselves; in one's own opinion
vocabulary.example: I personally made this cake.

vocabulary.example: He felt pain in his breast.

vocabulary.eng_def: to deal with a difficult situation successfully

vocabulary.eng_def: close to a number or amount but not exact
vocabulary.example: There were approximately 50 people.

image_prompts: A person standing at an airport with a suitcase, looking at a sign that says 'International Flights' to show traveling abroad.
A person with a happy expression looking at a large white presidential palace with a flag, with a city skyline in the background.
A student sitting at a desk with books and a laptop, smiling, with a lightbulb above their head to show learning and enhancement.
A kind man helping a person who looks worried, with a factory building in the background that has a sign 'Coat Manufacturer'.
A person standing in front of a government building with a 'Democracy' sign, looking proud and pointing at a book.
A playground with a broken slide on the ground and a worried parent nearby, with a sign that says 'Closed for Safety'.
A person handing a wrapped gift to a friend, and the friend putting it into the pocket of their jacket.
A person receiving a shiny coin from a stranger's hand, with a warm glow over their chest area.
A person standing on a mountain top with a flag of victory, looking confident, with a number '10' floating nearby.
A person swimming happily in a blue pool, with a sunset in the background and a relaxed expression.
